# terrible_amazon_aws_backup_selection (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backup_plan_name` (String) Uniquely identifies the backup plan to be associated with the selection of resources.
- `backup_selection_name` (String) The display name of a resource selection document. Must contain 1 to 50 alphanumeric or '-_.' characters.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `conditions` (String) A list of conditions (expressed as a dict) that you define to assign resources to your backup plans using tags. When you specify more than one condition in *conditions*, you only assign the resources that match ALL conditions (using AND logic). `conditions` supports `string_equals`, `string_like`, `string_not_equals`, and `string_not_like`. `list_of_tags` only supports `string_equals`.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `iam_role_arn` (String) The ARN of the IAM role that Backup uses to authenticate when backing up the target resource.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `list_of_tags` (String) A list of conditions that you define to assign resources to your backup plans using tags. Condition operators are case sensitive. When you specify more than one condition in `list_of_tags`, you assign all resources that match AT LEAST ONE condition (using OR logic).
- `not_resources` (String) A list of Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) to exclude from a backup plan. The maximum number of ARNs is 500 without wildcards, or 30 ARNs with wildcards. If you need to exclude many resources from a backup plan, consider a different resource selection strategy, such as assigning only one or a few resource types or refining your resource selection using tags.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `resources` (String) A list of Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) to assign to a backup plan. The maximum number of ARNs is 500 without wildcards, or 30 ARNs with wildcards. If you need to assign many resources to a backup plan, consider a different resource selection strategy, such as assigning all resources of a resource type or refining your resource selection using tags.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Create, delete a backup selection.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `backup_selection` (String) Backup selection details.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
